allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''@hugeicons/core-free-icons''\).then\(m => { const keys = Object.keys\(m\).filter\(n => n.endsWith\(''Icon''\)\); [''Notification0'', ''CreditCard0'', ''Paint'', ''Colour'', ''Customiz''].forEach\(s => { const matches = keys.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(s.toLowerCase\(\)\)\).slice\(0,5\); console.log\(s + '': '' + matches.join\('', ''\)\); }\); }\);")
